ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd. is streamlining its corporate structure by amalgamating its wholly-owned real estate subsidiary, Indoborax Infrastructure Private Limited, into the parent chemical company. This move aims to enhance operational efficiency, simplify financial reporting, and consolidate management, with no change in the parent company's shareholding. A notable point for analysts is the subsidiary's substantial net worth (INR 72.44 Crores) despite minimal turnover, indicating the integration of significant, potentially underutilized, real estate assets into the core chemical business.
